textByHashes.793d4d3438a02c05cc6095b8c22a3d80ded44e0d: What would you do without me?
textByHashes.9f3d9b214d62bdf0182a3784a3c1d2ffba7e7c12: I hope you get a drop soon.
textByHashes.780dcbfcfbbf5657d91b03a3b8ed72418d993789: I serve a new master now.
textByHashes.89b4ed8c36b876e8ab75985741ce3cf438fcfaa0: You have everything you need to succeed.
textByHashes.04d2ce6ee7e94317968c370bcdc2b24b4e65226c: Take it one day at a time.
textByHashes.2fe77ba1d9dfe56bda1fef8fd6fa919a2fc40dd4: I hope you get the drop soon!
textByHashes.346babe386174592574bbc0ecd8bc2cb78133339: Great things are coming your way!
textByHashes.2ff854bf2319eccd96cea6c45767dc6f414fc3fd: You are capable of anything you believe in!
textByHashes.8dae4777ea5916c7229e8f1aacd5cdcf0dab106c: You've come so far, don't stop now!
textByHashes.67d914492b394cb4d0a56d71dbd271f5d086a92f: It's okay to take break, you're still making progress.
textByHashes.9b9fbfb6e99abe290043e7181359620f9ed24849: Don't forget how far you've come!
textByHashes.bd54b8cca235d17eba56408834bbd333a3600f31: Your courage is your super power.
